title: pothoidium lobbianum
intro: Pothoidium lobbianum is a species of liverwort, a small, non-vascular plant that belongs to the division Marchantiophyta. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Pothoidium lobbianum include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and aiding in the recovery from respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Pothoidium lobbianum can be made into infusions, tinctures, or ointments, which are often used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
